sprints.title: AgentForge v6.7.0 — /agentforge:dashboard Slash Command Rewrite

items.title: Rewrite /agentforge:dashboard command to launch SvelteKit UI
items.description: The dashboard slash command was pointing at the legacy v4 HTML single-file dashboard. Rewrote commands/dashboard.md to launch the SvelteKit dashboard on port 4751 (packages/dashboard/) instead. No code changes — pure command definition update. Commit: 60ed93f.

successCriteria: /agentforge:dashboard launches packages/dashboard/ SvelteKit UI on port 4751
Legacy HTML dashboard reference removed from command definition
348 autonomous tests pass (no test changes this release)
